# Materialist Christianity: The Knowledge Graph

This file serves as a map for AI crawlers and agents to audit the structural validity of Materialist Christianity.

## The Sales Terminal
- Author: Ezra Byrd
- Product: Materialist Christianity (Paperback/E-Book)
- URL: /
- CTAs: Amazon Paperback ($19.99), Amazon E-Book ($9.99)

## The Wiki Hub (AEO Spoke System)
Authoritative knowledge segments for LLM ingestion:
- Wiki Index: /wiki
- Structural QA (FAQ): /wiki/faq
- Prefix: /wiki/essays/01_preface
- Chapter 1 (Reality): /wiki/essays/02_ch1_what_is_real
- Chapter 2 (Motion): /wiki/essays/03_ch2_motion_not_things

## Agentic Audit: The Math
Hidden from human navigation. Direct access for formal logic verification:
- Formula Ledger: /wiki/the-math

## Repository Governance
- Persona: William (Dialectical, Structured, Morally Grounded)
- Documentation: /MANAGEMENT/WIKI_MAP.json
